KURORO RANCH

FARM, MAKE FRIENDS, CATCH $KURO!

KURORO RANCH

FARM, MAKE FRIENDS, CATCH $KURO!

What is Kuroro Beasts?

Kuroro Beasts is a multidimensional gaming ecosystem. The island of Kuroro is the backdrop for an ever-growing world where Beasts with elemental powers roam free. Here, trainers from around the world set out to explore, collect, craft, battle and master the elements.

In the world of Kuroro, you own the assets you play with and can take them with you across all of our games.

LEARN MORE

Games and Experiences

Kuroro Ranch

Live Now on Telegram

Kuroro Ranch is a tamagochi style beast farming game. Take care of your Kuroro Beast, pet it, feed it, and level it up while improving your ranch. Try to get the coveted lucky!

Kuroro Wilds: Call of the Islands

Alpha Launch Soon

Kuroro Wilds is a first of its kind creature-collecting RPG with real time action combat. Collect, build teams, battle, fish, mine, craft, and build ever lasting friendships.

Launching Soon!

Kuroro Ancients

Your Kuroro Identity!

Kuroro Ancients are your identity within the Kuroro ecosystem, participate in the Raffle to be lucky enough to earn a spot in the limited edition Ancients enjoying a set of special benefits!

REGISTER FOR THE RAFFLE!

Kuroro Beast Brawl

Beta launch soon

Face-off in the battle arena against players from around the globe in this free PVP web-based game.

Beta Launching Soon!

$KURO Airdrop

$KURO is the native token powering the Kuroro Beasts ecosystem. It has a fixed supply of 1,000,000,000 tokens. The token is set to launch in 2024 with constantly expanding use cases within the Kuroro universe designed to enhance player experiences.

70,000,000

$KURO (7%)

  • $KURO will be distributed amongst participants of the Play to Airdrop
  • Participation in this Play to Airdrop is 100% free - no purchases required!
  • The higher your Level and Rank in the Airdrop, the more $KURO and other bonuses you will receive!

Our Collections

To get the most out of your Kuroro Beasts experience, purchase our unique collectable and tradable gameplay assets on Treasure, or rent them on LootRush.

BUY ON TREASURERENT ON LOOTRUSH

Origins Beasts

With only 6,600 in circulation, these self-replicating Origin Beasts are able to produce additional Scion Beasts and are core to the Kuroro ecosystem.

VIEW COLLECTION

Beasts

These Beasts are elemental creatures found on the Kuroro Islands. With 12 unique elements, these collectible game characters each bring unique charm and skills, enriching your gaming journey. Collect and play with your favorite Beasts from this ever-growing roster.

VIEW COLLECTION

Trainer Badges

From giveaways and collaborations to racking up more $KURO, these tradeable NFTs unlock a variety of exclusive rewards.

VIEW COLLECTION

Careers

We’re always on the lookout for the best of the best to join our pack. From game designers to community managers, all of our roles are 100% remote.

Check back for new openings to work with our growing global team.
